name: Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones
description: Industry-leading noise cancelling headphones with 30-hour battery life. Features multipoint connection and crystal clear hands-free calling. Foldable design for easy portability.

name: Sony WH-1000XM4 Wireless Headphones
description: Previous generation Sony noise cancelling headphones with 35-hour battery life. Excellent sound quality with LDAC support and speak-to-chat technology.

name: Bose QuietComfort 45 Headphones
description: Premium wireless headphones with world-class noise cancellation. Lightweight design with soft ear cushions for all-day comfort. 24-hour battery life with quick charge.

name: Apple AirPods Pro (2nd Gen)
description: Active noise cancellation with Transparency mode. Adaptive Audio adjusts to your environment in real time. MagSafe charging case with up to 30 hours total battery.

name: Anker Soundcore Q45 Headphones
description: Budget-friendly wireless headphones with active noise cancelling. 50-hour playtime and hi-res audio certification. Foldable design with carrying case included.

name: Logitech MX Master 3S Mouse
description: Advanced wireless mouse with ultra-fast MagSpeed scrolling and 8K DPI sensor. Works on any surface including glass. Ergonomic design for all-day comfort.

name: Keychron K2 Mechanical Keyboard
description: Compact 75% wireless mechanical keyboard compatible with Mac and Windows. Hot-swappable switches with RGB backlight. Aluminium frame for a premium typing experience.

name: Samsung 27" 4K Monitor
description: Ultra-high definition IPS monitor with 99% sRGB coverage and HDR support. Slim bezel design with VESA mount compatibility. USB-C connectivity with 65W power delivery.

name: Portable Bluetooth Speaker
description: Waterproof outdoor speaker with 360-degree sound and 20-hour playtime. Dustproof and shockproof casing suitable for beach, hiking, and camping. Pairs with two devices simultaneously.

name: USB-C Charging Hub 7-in-1
description: Expand your laptop with 4K HDMI, 100W PD pass-through, SD card reader, and three USB-A ports. Aluminium shell with thermal management. Compatible with MacBook and Windows laptops.

name: Trail Running Shoes - Men
description: Lightweight trail running shoes with aggressive grip outsole for technical terrain. Breathable mesh upper with rock protection plate. Available in wide fit.

name: Trail Running Shoes - Women
description: Women-specific trail running shoes with responsive cushioning and durable outsole. Waterproof Gore-Tex membrane keeps feet dry on wet terrain. Reflective details for low-light visibility.

name: Yoga Mat Premium Non-Slip
description: 6mm thick eco-friendly yoga mat with alignment lines and non-slip texture on both sides. Includes carrying strap and free online beginner yoga guide. Odour-resistant material.

name: Adjustable Dumbbell Set 5-52.5 lbs
description: Space-saving adjustable dumbbells replace 15 sets of weights. Dial system adjusts in 2.5 lb increments. Secure locking mechanism and durable moulded plastic coating.

name: Resistance Bands Set
description: Set of five resistance bands with varying tension levels from 10 to 50 lbs. Includes door anchor, handles, and ankle straps. Suitable for rehabilitation and strength training.

name: Foam Roller for Muscle Recovery
description: High-density foam roller for deep tissue massage and myofascial release. Grid pattern for targeted pressure. Hollow core for durability. Ideal for pre and post workout.

name: Ceramic Pour-Over Coffee Set
description: Hand-thrown ceramic dripper with matching carafe for a refined pour-over brewing ritual. Includes 40 bleached paper filters. Dishwasher safe. Brews 600ml per batch.

name: Stainless Steel French Press
description: Double-walled stainless steel French press that keeps coffee hot for up to an hour. Micro-filtered plunger prevents grounds from entering your cup. 1 litre capacity.

name: Bamboo Cutting Board Set
description: Set of three bamboo cutting boards in small, medium, and large sizes. Naturally antimicrobial surface with juice groove on large board. Includes non-slip feet.

name: Cast Iron Skillet 12 inch
description: Pre-seasoned cast iron skillet for even heat distribution and superior heat retention. Oven safe to 500°F. Compatible with all cooktops including induction. Builds natural non-stick patina over time.

name: Linen Duvet Cover Set - Queen
description: 100% French linen duvet cover with two pillowcases. Pre-washed for a soft, lived-in feel from day one. Breathable and thermoregulating for year-round comfort. Stone-washed finish.

name: Scented Soy Candle - Cedarwood
description: Hand-poured soy wax candle with pure cedarwood and sandalwood essential oils. 50-hour burn time in a reusable amber glass jar. Lead-free cotton wick. Made in small batches.

name: Air Purifier with HEPA Filter
description: True HEPA air purifier covering up to 500 sq ft. Removes 99.97% of airborne particles including dust, pollen, and pet dander. Auto mode adjusts fan speed based on air quality sensor.

name: Linen Overshirt - Natural
description: Relaxed-fit overshirt in 100% European linen. Breathable and lightweight for warm weather layering. Chest pocket and button-through placket. Garment-washed for a soft drape.

name: Merino Wool Crew Neck Sweater
description: Classic crew neck sweater in 100% merino wool. Naturally temperature-regulating, odour-resistant, and machine washable. Ribbed cuffs and hem for a refined finish. Available in 8 colours.

name: Organic Cotton T-Shirt Pack (3)
description: Pack of three essential t-shirts in GOTS-certified organic cotton. Pre-shrunk fabric with a structured fit that doesn't lose shape after washing. Available in white, black, and grey.

name: Waterproof Hiking Jacket
description: 3-layer waterproof and windproof hardshell jacket with fully taped seams. Packable into its own chest pocket. Helmet-compatible hood with one-hand adjustment. 20,000mm waterproof rating.

name: Slim Chino Trousers
description: Slim-fit chino trousers in stretch cotton blend for all-day comfort. Four-pocket styling with a clean, tailored silhouette. Machine washable. Available in khaki, navy, and olive.

name: Down Puffer Vest
description: Lightweight 700-fill down vest with windproof shell. Packable design fits into its own pocket. Ideal as a mid-layer under a shell or worn standalone in mild weather.

name: Vitamin C Brightening Serum
description: 15% L-ascorbic acid serum with vitamin E and ferulic acid for maximum antioxidant protection. Reduces dark spots and evens skin tone with daily use. Suitable for all skin types.

name: Retinol Night Cream
description: 0.3% encapsulated retinol cream with hyaluronic acid and ceramides. Minimises fine lines and refines skin texture overnight. Fragrance-free and dermatologist-tested formula.

name: SPF 50 Mineral Sunscreen
description: Lightweight mineral sunscreen with zinc oxide. No white cast formula suitable for all skin tones. Water-resistant for 80 minutes. Reef-safe and fragrance-free. Daily use size 75ml.

name: Hyaluronic Acid Moisturiser
description: Lightweight gel-cream moisturiser with three molecular weights of hyaluronic acid for deep and surface hydration. Non-comedogenic formula suitable for oily and combination skin types.

name: Rosehip Facial Oil
description: Cold-pressed rosehip seed oil rich in omega fatty acids and beta-carotene. Absorbs quickly without greasiness. Certified organic and sustainably sourced. 30ml dropper bottle.

name: Niacinamide 10% Serum
description: High-strength niacinamide serum that visibly reduces pore size and controls excess sebum. Pairs well with hyaluronic acid and vitamin C. 30ml with dropper applicator.

name: Atomic Habits by James Clear
description: The definitive guide to building good habits and breaking bad ones. Practical framework based on tiny 1% improvements that compound over time. Over 10 million copies sold worldwide.

name: Deep Work by Cal Newport
description: Rules for focused success in a distracted world. Argues that the ability to perform deep, undistracted work is becoming increasingly rare and valuable. Essential reading for knowledge workers.

name: The Design of Everyday Things
description: Don Norman's classic on user-centred design. Explains why some products satisfy customers while others frustrate them. Essential reading for designers, engineers, and product managers.

name: Thinking, Fast and Slow
description: Daniel Kahneman's exploration of the two systems that drive human thought. Covers cognitive biases, decision-making, and the psychology of judgement. Groundbreaking and accessible.

name: Clean Code by Robert C. Martin
description: A handbook of agile software craftsmanship. Covers naming, functions, error handling, and refactoring with practical examples in Java. Required reading for professional software developers.

name: The Pragmatic Programmer
description: Your journey to mastery. Covers topics from personal responsibility and career development to architectural techniques for keeping code flexible and easy to adapt and reuse.

name: Insulated Water Bottle 1L
description: Double-wall vacuum insulated stainless steel bottle. Keeps drinks cold for 24 hours and hot for 12 hours. Leak-proof lid with carry loop. BPA-free and dishwasher safe.

name: Gym Bag with Shoe Compartment
description: 40L duffel bag with separate ventilated shoe compartment and wet/dry pouch. Padded shoulder strap and grab handle. Multiple internal pockets for organised storage.

name: Jump Rope - Speed Cable
description: Lightweight aluminium handle speed rope with adjustable PVC-coated steel cable. Ball bearing handles for smooth, fast rotation. Used in CrossFit and boxing training.

name: Wireless Charging Pad 15W
description: Fast wireless charger compatible with iPhone and Android devices. 15W output for Samsung, 12W for iPhone MagSafe, 10W for standard Qi devices. LED indicator with sleep-friendly dim mode.

name: Standing Desk Mat Anti-Fatigue
description: Ergonomic anti-fatigue mat for standing desks with bevelled edges to prevent tripping. Memory foam core with durable polyurethane surface. 75cm x 50cm footprint.

name: Himalayan Salt Lamp
description: Authentic hand-carved Himalayan pink salt lamp with dimmer switch. Warm amber glow creates a calming atmosphere. Each lamp is unique in shape and size. 3-4kg average weight.

name: Merino Wool Running Socks (3 Pack)
description: Cushioned merino wool running socks with arch support and blister-resistant stitching. Moisture-wicking and naturally odour-resistant. Quarter-length with reinforced heel and toe.

name: Cold Brew Coffee Maker
description: 1.5 litre cold brew coffee maker with ultra-fine mesh filter. Steep in the fridge for 12-24 hours for a smooth, low-acidity brew. Airtight lid keeps fresh for up to two weeks.

name: Portable Laptop Stand Foldable
description: Adjustable aluminium laptop stand with six height and angle settings. Folds flat for travel. Compatible with 10-16 inch laptops. Improves posture and reduces neck strain during work.
